filesystem.description: File system operations for the project directory

enhanced-postgres-dev.description: Enhanced PostgreSQL for development (supplement to existing Supabase MCP)

sentry.description: Error tracking and monitoring with Sentry

mailerlite.description: Email marketing and automation with MailerLite (custom MCP server)

notes.smtp: For transactional emails, use nodemailer or similar libraries directly. For marketing emails, use MailerLite MCP.
notes.posthog: No dedicated MCP server found. Use posthog-node or posthog-js directly.
notes.mailerlite: Use for email marketing campaigns, subscriber management, and automation. Requires MAILERLITE_API_TOKEN from your MailerLite account.
notes.security: Always use dev environment for testing. Prod access requires extra caution.
notes.rls: Remember to test RLS policies on investor tables for each PR as per project rules.
